overall.description: A gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 beginning with a third-person view of a character at a street food stall, transitioning to first-person perspective seated at a table, then exploring a neon-lit pedestrian alleyway with industrial architecture and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food stall in covered alleyway

events.description: character takes a drink from the cup and interacts with the vendor
character turns and walks away from the food stall

agents.ego_description: character in green tank top standing at food stall counter, drinking from a cup and conversing with vendor

notable_agents.action: vendor behind counter serving drinks and interacting with customer

entered.detail: metal counter with various bottles and cooking equipment
striped corrugated metal sheet dividing the stall space
dark brick wall with white graffiti markings
collection of glass bottles on a metal shelf
exposed metal beams and piping overhead with hanging lights

segments.scene_description: A third-person view of a muscular character in a green tank top standing at a street food stall in a narrow covered alley. The character drinks from a cup while interacting with the vendor behind the metal counter, surrounded by industrial architecture and corrugated metal partitions.

events.description: NPC wearing green and yellow sits down at the table across from camera
NPC gets up and walks away from the table

agents.ego_description: sitting at metal table with whiskey bottle and glasses, observing the alleyway

notable_agents.action: sits down at table, pauses briefly, then gets up and leaves

entered.detail: weathered metal table with drinks and ashtray
square bottle with amber liquid and ornate label
glass with red liquid sitting on table
black square ashtray on metal table
illuminated blue ATM screen with advertisements

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to first-person, seated at a metal table in the alley with a whiskey bottle and glasses. An NPC briefly sits across the table before leaving. The food stall is visible in the background while neon signs illuminate the industrial brick walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian alley with neon signage

events.description: camera gets up from table and begins walking through the alley
woman in neon green shorts walks past camera closely

agents.ego_description: walking through the cyberpunk alley, passing pedestrians and observing neon signs and industrial architecture

notable_agents.action: woman in neon green shorts walking past the camera

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading CALIFORNIA with circular logo
metal walkway structure spanning the alley overhead
blue neon chevron arrow sign on left wall
scattered paper and trash on concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the narrow cyberpunk alley in first-person, passing under industrial overhead structures and neon signs. Pedestrians walk through the corridor, including a woman in bright neon shorts. The camera loops back toward the food stall area, with the counter reappearing on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a third-person observation of a street food stall into a first-person exploration of a neon-lit industrial alley. It begins with a view of a muscular character in a green tank top drinking from a cup while interacting with a vendor behind a metal counter. As the perspective shifts to first-person, the camera settles at a metal table with a whiskey bottle and glasses, watching an NPC briefly sit and then depart against a backdrop of glowing neon signs and brick walls. The scene then expands as the camera moves forward through the narrow corridor, passing under industrial overhead structures and alongside pedestrians, including a woman in bright neon shorts. Finally, the movement loops back toward the starting point, with the food stall counter reappearing on the right side of the frame.
